description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular structure displayed on a pedestal within a minimalist exhibition space. The kiosk features a predominantly white exterior with red horizontal accents and a flat roof, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The front side is detailed with what appears to be a service window or counter, flanked by vertical red elements, and possibly signage above. The rear and side views show a continuation of the red and white color scheme, with no visible windows or doors on those faces. The kiosk is constructed from solid, hard materials, likely metal or composite panels, and is designed to be a standalone unit. Above the kiosk, a wall-mounted display features photographic panels, possibly illustrating the kiosk in various urban contexts.
description: A compact, modern kiosk with a white and red color scheme, flat roof, and a service window on the front. Displayed on a pedestal in a minimalist exhibition setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the service window, red vertical accents, and wall-mounted photographic panels above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kiosk's depth, solid side panel, and the pedestal base.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the flat roof and the overall footprint of the kiosk and exhibition space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the solid side panel and pedestal visible.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated above the service window, with photographic panels mounted on the wall behind the kiosk; no visible text.
attribute_window_presence: one rectangular service window on the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, solid surface, no visible overhangs or decorative elements
